name: scheduler-operations-playbook
description: Create, inspect, update, run, diagnose, and verify Prometheus scheduled jobs, including cron/interval timing, ownership, expected outputs, delivery, retries, and run history. Use for scheduler operations; do not use for ordinary foreground tasks or generic background-agent work.

defaultWorkflow: Inspect job inventory with schedule_job list or automation_dashboard.
Use schedule_job_patch preview/apply for supported field changes; use schedule_job update only for unsupported fields.
Run now when safe, then verify detail/history, linked task status, expected outputs, and actual delivery payloads.
Create bounded internal_watch for asynchronous completion when the result may arrive after the current turn.
Write a continuity note for meaningful fixes, blockers, or operational discoveries.

resources.description: Scheduler recovery note for non-vision model/image-input failures and output verification after model patches.
Guardrail for scheduled jobs whose run status says success but final output is a tool/error string or missing report artifact.
Guardrail for managed-team scheduled jobs whose cron status succeeds while manager output is idle, a greeting, or embedded provider quota error.
Guardrail for scheduled jobs repeatedly failing with openai_codex no-activity timeouts.
